title: Piano Concertos By Candlelight Rachmaninoff 2 Feat Candlelight Orchestra
description: SELLOUT EdFringe25 pianist Matthew Shiel performs Rachmaninoff’s Second Piano Concerto with his Candlelight Orchestra - by enchanting candlelight for a truly atmospheric and unforgettable performance!!! Rachmaninoff’s Second Piano Concerto erupts with sweeping passion and aching lyricism, pulling you into a world where every chord surges, shimmers, and refuses to let go. Voted No. 1 in Classic FM’s Hall of Fame. Matthew Shiel is an award-winning pianist who has collaborated with BBC Scottish Symphony Orchestra (broadcast on BBC Radio 3), The Band of His Majesty’s Royal Marine Band Scotland and has been broadcast on Al Jazeera. Matthew will conduct his acclaimed Candlelight Orchestra from the piano as Mozart and Bach themselves did for an unforgettable evening of musical elegance.

venue.name: St Paul's Church
venue.address: St Pauls Church, West Street, East Sussex
